rationale: Educ. Code §49.311 governs student attendance counting and fund allocation for detached property; it contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: For purposes of determining average daily attendance under Section 48.005, the student shall be counted in the district to which the property is annexed.
_note: No operative link between the homestead exemption amount and the attendance/fund allocation mechanics in this section. Indirect revenue impacts on school districts would flow through other finance provisions, not §49.311.
